config_summary:
conf = Config(
    Paths(logFile='build/test/baselines-work-errtol/ex_lfs.log',
          outputDir='build/test/baselines-work-errtol/ex_lfs'),
    General(fixedBurnedVal=False,
            fixedLeftLocation=True,
            nThreads=4),
    Grid(dvtol=0.15,
         gridMax=0.001,
         gridMin=5e-06,
         vtol=0.1),
    InitialCondition(equivalenceRatio=0.9,
                     oxidizer='O2:1, N2:3.76',
                     xLeft=0.0,
                     xRight=0.01),
    StrainParameters(final=0,
                     initial=0),
    PositionControl(proportionalGain=2000,
                    xFinal=0.005,
                    xInitial=0.005),
    Times(profileStepInterval=50),
    TerminationCondition(tolerance=1e-05))
deviations_from_stock: Paths.outputDir/logFile redirected into scratch --outdir (no effect on physics)

Note (inherited from stock example, not introduced here): conf.validate() prints "PositionControl can only be used when either 'twinFlame' or 'cylindricalFlame' is set to True. Validation failed." This example configures PositionControl on a planar, non-twin flame; the stock example script has this same validation warning and still runs it. Non-fatal; run proceeds.
